site.scopeOfWork: Existing 1,041 SF SFR (1954) on 7,210 SF R-1 lot. ADU plans paid and pending city approval. R-1 allows 1 ADU (1,200 SF max) + 1 JADU (500 SF max). 50% lot coverage limit (3,605 SF max). ADU setbacks: 4ft side/rear.
site.notes: Assessor map Book 231 Page 54. Map shows 70ft frontage, ~89.24ft partial depth. Full depth 103ft reconciles with 7210 SF (70x103=7210). Prior data had 60x120 which was wrong.

planningAreas.val: City of Garden Grove — General Plan Land Use Element (2021)

planningAreas.name: LAND USE DESIGNATION
planningAreas.val: Low Density Residential (LDR) — 1–11 du/acre, single-family detached. Source: Garden Grove General Plan Land Use Element (2021 public review); R-1 parcels carry LDR designation.

planningAreas.name: TRANSIT PRIORITY AREA (TPA)
planningAreas.val: TBD — check SCAG TPA map (hub.scag.ca.gov) for 12652 Laux Ave. Garden Grove has OCTA bus routes but no rail; no qualifying 15-min high-frequency service confirmed near this address.

planningAreas.name: PARKING STANDARDS (PSTPA)
planningAreas.val: TBD — follows from TPA determination above. If Not TPA: standard R-1 parking requirements apply.

planningAreas.name: MOBILITY CHOICES
planningAreas.val: N/A -- Garden Grove (not SD Municipal Code)

overlayZones.name: AIRPORT INFLUENCE AREA
overlayZones.val: TBD — possibly in outer zone of Fullerton Municipal Airport (FMA) ALUCP (~6.5 mi NW); John Wayne (SNA) ~8 mi S, outside. Check FMA AELUP PDF outer boundary map (files.ocair.com/media/2021-02/AELUP%20for%20FMA%2005092019.pdf) or OC ALUC (ocair.com). Source: OC ALUC research 2026-04-15.

overlayZones.name: VERY HIGH FIRE HAZARD
overlayZones.val: Not Designated — Garden Grove is fully urbanized suburban Orange County; no LRA or SRA FHSZ designation. Source: CAL FIRE FHSZ viewer; OCFA FHSZ maps (confirmed 2026-04-15).

overlayZones.name: FAULT ZONE
overlayZones.val: No Alquist-Priolo fault zone at this address; likely in CGS Liquefaction Hazard Zone (alluvial soils, high groundwater). Confirm at maps.conservation.ca.gov/cgs/informationwarehouse/eqzapp/. Source: Garden Grove Safety Element (2021).

overlayZones.name: FEMA FLOOD ZONE
overlayZones.val: Likely Zone X — minimal hazard (Orange County flatlands; panel series 06059C). Confirm at msc.fema.gov. Source: OC Flood Insurance Study 06059CV001C (2026-04-15).
